description: Tenacious Conversion Engine — April 2026 evaluation pilot cost ledger
qualification_proxy: pass@1 from tau2-bench retail evaluation (reward=1.0 traces)

line_items.description: LLM inference — tau2-bench retail evaluation (150 simulations × Qwen3-80B via OpenRouter)
Outbound email delivery — Resend API (150 initial outreach emails)
SMS confirmation — Africa's Talking (warm-lead booking confirmations, ~20 warm leads)
line_items.source: Africa's Talking sandbox billing log; channel reserved for warm leads only

line_items.description: Infrastructure — Render.com free tier (FastAPI agent hosting)
line_items.source: Render free tier; no charge during evaluation period

line_items.description: Webhook tunnel — ngrok free tier (local dev webhook relay)
line_items.source: ngrok free tier; production deployment on Render eliminates this cost

line_items.description: CRM writes — HubSpot free tier (contact upserts + email activity logs)
line_items.source: HubSpot free tier; no charge under 1,000 contacts

line_items.description: Booking API — Cal.com (discovery-call booking, pay-as-you-go tier)

unit_economics.qualified_lead_definition: Lead where agent successfully advanced to discovery-call stage (reward=1.0 in tau2-bench; Cal.com booking confirmed for live evidence lead)

notes: All costs are denominated in USD.
LLM cost is derived from trace_log.jsonl agent_cost field: sum = $2.985, avg = $0.0199/simulation.
Resend and Africa's Talking costs are estimated from free-tier billing rates for the evaluation volume.
Production scale would use Render Starter ($7/mo), adding $0.047/lead at 150 leads/month — still $4.95 under target.
30-day pilot recommendation (50 leads): projected cost = 50 × $0.03 + $7 infra = $8.50 total, $0.17/lead processed.
If pilot qualification rate matches evaluation (72.7%), 36 qualified leads at $0.24/qualified lead — well inside $5 target.
